title: Nusantara Chronicles
description: An epic open-world RPG set in a mythical Indonesian archipelago, filled with ancient kingdoms and legendary creatures. Explore breathtaking islands and uncover the secrets of the Nusantara.
longDescription:
Nusantara Chronicles drops you into a sprawling open world inspired by the rich cultures and landscapes of the Indonesian archipelago. From the lush jungles of Borneo to the volcanic peaks of Java, every corner of the map teems with life, mystery, and danger.

Play as Arjuna, a young warrior chosen by the gods to unite the fractured kingdoms against a dark force threatening to consume the islands. Your journey will take you through ancient temples, bustling port cities, and forgotten ruins hidden deep in the wilderness.

The game features a deep combat system blending traditional Indonesian martial arts (Pencak Silat) with supernatural abilities granted by mythical spirits known as Hyang. Master over 50 unique combat techniques and customize your playstyle to suit any situation.

Build alliances with rival kingdoms, romance memorable characters, and make choices that shape the fate of the archipelago. With over 100 hours of main and side content, no two playthroughs are the same.

Nusantara Chronicles is a love letter to Indonesian mythology and history, bringing legendary figures like Gatotkaca, Srikandi, and Loro Jonggrang to life in stunning detail.

title: Batavia Underworld
description: A gritty action-adventure set in 1920s colonial Batavia, where you play as a street enforcer navigating crime syndicates, corrupt officials, and resistance fighters. Every decision has consequences in this noir thriller.
longDescription:
Batavia Underworld transports you to the smoky, rain-soaked streets of colonial Batavia in the 1920s. As Raden, a former soldier turned street enforcer, you must navigate the dangerous web of crime syndicates, colonial authorities, and nascent independence movements that define this turbulent era.

The city of Batavia is a character unto itself — from the Dutch-built canals of Kota Tua to the cramped kampung alleys of Glodok, every district has its own power brokers, secrets, and opportunities. Choose your allies carefully, because loyalties shift like the monsoon winds.

Batavia Underworld features a dynamic morality system where your choices ripple across the city's factions. Help the resistance and earn the trust of the people, or side with the colonial syndicate for power and wealth. There is no clean path in Batavia.

Combat is visceral and grounded, drawing on period-accurate weapons: revolvers, machetes, and improvised tools of the street. The game also features stealth mechanics that reward patience and cunning over brute force.

With a fully voiced cast and a jazz-infused original soundtrack, Batavia Underworld delivers a cinematic experience unlike anything else on the market.

title: Wayang Warriors
description: A fast-paced 2.5D fighting game featuring iconic characters from Javanese Wayang mythology. Unlock 30+ fighters and battle across stunning hand-painted stages.
longDescription:
Wayang Warriors reimagines the epic heroes and villains of Javanese shadow puppet mythology as playable fighters in a blazing-fast 2.5D brawler. Choose from a roster of 30+ characters including Arjuna, Gatotkaca, Bima, Rahwana, and many more, each with a unique fighting style rooted in their mythological stories.

The game's art style is a breathtaking fusion of traditional wayang kulit aesthetics and modern game visuals. Stages are hand-painted by Indonesian artists and come alive with dynamic lighting, parallax layers, and weather effects.

Every character has a full move list inspired by their mythological abilities. Arjuna wields sacred arrows with pinpoint precision, Gatotkaca commands thunder and flight, while Rahwana uses dark magic and overwhelming strength. Master each fighter's mechanics to dominate the competition.

Wayang Warriors features multiple game modes: a Story Mode that retells the Mahabharata and Ramayana epics through stunning cutscenes, an Arcade ladder, online ranked matches, and a local 4-player party mode perfect for playing with friends and family.

Regular content updates will introduce new characters, stages, and seasonal events tied to Indonesian cultural celebrations throughout the year.

title: Komodo Survival
description: Stranded on a remote Indonesian island teeming with massive Komodo dragons, you must survive using only your wits and the resources around you. Build, craft, and endure.
longDescription:
Komodo Survival plunges you onto a procedurally generated island inspired by the Komodo National Park. After your research vessel sinks in a freak storm, you must survive against the island's apex predators — giant Komodo dragons with realistic AI behavior — while gathering resources and building shelter.

The survival loop is deep and rewarding. Gather food from the sea and jungle, purify water from tropical rain, and craft tools from bamboo, stone, and salvage from your sunken ship. The island's ecosystem is dynamic: prey animals migrate, plant life grows back over time, and the Komodo dragons hunt on their own schedule.

Building your camp is a core part of the experience. Construct walls, traps, elevated platforms, and eventually more advanced structures as your knowledge grows. The game features a progression system that unlocks new crafting recipes and building techniques as you explore and experiment.

Comodo Survival supports up to 4 players in online co-op. Work together to take down a massive alpha Komodo, construct an elaborate village, or just sail around the archipelago discovering new islands with unique biomes.

With a gorgeous tropical art style, dynamic weather, and a procedurally generated world, no two survival runs play the same.

title: Borobudur Ascending
description: A meditative puzzle-platformer where you guide a young monk through the nine levels of Borobudur temple, solving ancient riddles to reach enlightenment. A deeply moving journey through Buddhist philosophy.
longDescription:
Borobudur Ascending is a puzzle-platformer that uses the iconic nine-tiered structure of Borobudur temple as its world. You play as a young novice monk named Siddha who must climb each level of the temple by solving puzzles rooted in Buddhist teachings and ancient Javanese wisdom.

Each tier of Borobudur represents a different sphere of existence — from the world of desire at the base to the formless realm at the summit. As Siddha ascends, the puzzles grow more abstract and philosophical, mirroring the Buddhist path to enlightenment.

The game features no combat and no fail states — it is a pure puzzle experience designed to be relaxing and thought-provoking. The puzzles involve light, shadow, sound, and the geometry of the temple itself, encouraging players to observe their environment carefully before acting.

Borobudur Ascending was developed in close consultation with historians and Buddhist scholars to ensure an authentic and respectful portrayal of the monument and its spiritual significance. Relief panels from the real temple are recreated in stunning detail throughout the game.

The original score is performed by a traditional Gamelan ensemble and blends seamlessly with ambient nature sounds to create a deeply immersive atmosphere. An ideal game for quiet evenings and moments of reflection.

title: Raja of the Seas
description: Command a fleet of traditional Bugis sailing ships and build a maritime trading empire across the Indonesian archipelago. Wage sea battles, forge alliances, and dominate the spice trade.
longDescription:
Raja of the Seas is a grand strategy game that puts you at the helm of a Bugis maritime kingdom during the golden age of Indonesian seafaring. Starting with a single Pinisi vessel and a handful of loyal sailors, you must expand your fleet, capture strategic ports, and control the lucrative spice trade routes of the Nusantara.

The game blends real-time naval combat with turn-based strategic management. Design your fleet composition, hire specialist captains with unique skills, and personally take command in epic sea battles against rival kingdoms, European colonial traders, and fearsome pirates.

Your reputation as a ruler affects every aspect of the game. Trade fairly and your ports will flourish; resort to piracy and you'll attract powerful enemies. Diplomatic marriages, tribute arrangements, and military alliances are all tools at your disposal as you navigate the complex politics of the archipelago.

Raja of the Seas features a detailed economic simulation tracking supply and demand of dozens of trade goods — cloves, nutmeg, pepper, silk, and gold — across a procedurally generated map of the Indonesian archipelago. Finding the best trade routes and timing your voyages with the seasonal monsoon winds is key to amassing wealth.

Multiplayer lets up to 6 players compete for dominance of the seas in epic sessions that can last for days. A full scenario editor allows the community to create and share custom campaigns.

title: Panen Raya: Farm Simulator
description: Build your dream farm on the fertile slopes of a Javanese village, grow over 60 types of tropical crops, and build community bonds in this cozy farm life simulation. The perfect game to unwind.
longDescription:
Panen Raya: Farm Simulator is a cozy farming life game set in a warm and welcoming Javanese village surrounded by volcanic mountains and emerald rice terraces. Inherit your grandmother's neglected farm and transform it into a thriving agricultural paradise.

Grow over 60 types of crops native to the Indonesian archipelago — from rice and cassava to exotic fruits like salak, manggis, and durian. Each crop has its own growing seasons, soil requirements, and care needs. Learn the rhythms of the land and master the art of Indonesian farming.

The village community is the heart of Panen Raya. Get to know your neighbors, participate in traditional ceremonies like Seren Taun (harvest festival) and gotong royong (community work), and build relationships that unlock new gameplay opportunities and heartfelt story moments.

Expand your farm with a chicken coop, fish pond, and a small warung (roadside stall) to sell your produce. Upgrade your tools, unlock new recipes for traditional Indonesian dishes, and decorate your farmhouse with authentic Javanese furniture and artwork.

Panen Raya supports 4-player online co-op so you and your friends can farm together, share resources, and build the village of your collective dreams. Regular seasonal events keep the game fresh year-round.

title: Gundala: City of Storms
description: Become Indonesia's greatest superhero in this action-packed brawler. Harness the power of lightning to protect the city from a rising crime empire and supernatural threats.
longDescription:
Gundala: City of Storms is an action game based on Indonesia's legendary comic book superhero. Play as Sancaka, a young electrician who gains the power of lightning after being struck by a supernatural storm, and use those powers to protect the sprawling city of Jagat from gangs, corrupt politicians, and ancient enemies.

The game features fast-paced, fluid combat that evolves as you master Gundala's electrical powers. Charge your fists with lightning for devastating punches, call down thunderbolts on groups of enemies, and use your electrical sense to detect threats through walls. As you level up, unlock devastating combo attacks and passive abilities that complement your playstyle.

Jagat is a dense, vibrant open world that captures the chaotic energy of a modern Indonesian city. From gleaming shopping malls to flooded kampung neighborhoods, each district has its own atmosphere, crime rates, and resident faction. Your actions in each area affect how citizens and criminals respond to you.

The main story is a political thriller about corruption, inequality, and the power of one person to make a difference — themes deeply resonant with the original 1969 comic. Voice acting is performed by a stellar cast of Indonesian actors.

Side content includes random crimes to stop, collectible comic book pages from the original Gundala series, and optional boss fights against a colorful rogues' gallery drawn straight from Indonesian comic book lore.

title: Kampung Defenders
description: A charming tower defense game where you protect your kampung from waves of mischievous spirits using towers built from traditional Indonesian materials. Featuring over 100 levels across 5 unique islands.
longDescription:
Kampung Defenders is a colorful and strategic tower defense game set in a vibrant Indonesian village threatened by naughty spirits from local folklore. As the village elder's granddaughter, you must place and upgrade a variety of uniquely Indonesian defense towers to protect your home.

Towers include the Gamelan Tower (stuns enemies with sound vibrations), the Sate Tower (distracts enemies with irresistible aroma), the Kujang Tower (deals massive damage to single targets), and the Batik Weaver (slows enemies with tangled threads). Each tower has three upgrade paths offering wildly different strategic options.

The game features over 100 hand-designed levels spread across five distinct island biomes: Javanese rice fields, Balinese temple grounds, Sumatran rainforest, Kalimantan riverside, and Sulawesi coastal cliffs. Each biome introduces new enemy types and environmental mechanics.

Enemies are drawn from Indonesian folklore and include playful Pocong that bounce unpredictably, sneaky Tuyul that steal your coins, spectral Kuntilanak that buff nearby enemies, and massive Buto giants that shrug off multiple hits. Learning each enemy's weakness is key to building effective defenses.

Kampung Defenders also includes a level editor and Steam Workshop support so the community can create and share their own diabolically difficult stages.

title: Jakarta Rush
description: A high-octane street racing game set in a meticulously recreated Jakarta. Race through Sudirman, the coastal highway, and underground tunnel circuits in 200+ unlockable cars.
longDescription:
Jakarta Rush is the ultimate street racing experience set in a pixel-perfect recreation of Indonesia's capital city. Race through lovingly detailed versions of iconic Jakarta locations — Jalan Sudirman's glittering skyscrapers, Ancol's coastal highway, the historic streets of Kota Tua, and secret underground circuits beneath Semanggi interchange.

The game features over 200 meticulously modeled cars, from imported supercars to heavily modified local favorites like the Kijang and Kancil tuned to ridiculous extremes. The tuning system is the deepest in the genre: adjust suspension, gear ratios, tire compounds, aerodynamics, and engine internals to build the perfect race machine.

Race modes include Point-to-Point Sprints across the city, Circuit Races on closed tracks, Drift Battles on winding mountain roads to Puncak, and the legendary Jakarta Underground championship that runs only on rainy nights through flooded back streets.

Jakarta Rush features a rich career mode where you start as a small-time racer and climb through Jakarta's underground racing scene, earning the respect of legendary drivers and eventually challenging the city's undefeated champion. The story is fully voiced in Indonesian.

Online multiplayer supports up to 16 racers in ranked competitive events and casual lobbies. Regular real-world event tie-ins bring special liveries and cars from Indonesian motorsport events.

title: Silat Master
description: A brutal and authentic martial arts game showcasing 12 regional styles of Pencak Silat. Train under legendary masters, enter tournaments, and defend your village from outside threats.
longDescription:
Silat Master is a martial arts game built on a foundation of deep respect for the Pencak Silat tradition. Working with real masters from across Indonesia, the developers motion-captured over 2,000 authentic techniques representing 12 distinct regional Silat styles — from the flowing elegance of Minangkabau Silek to the explosive power of Betawi Beksi.

The game's combat engine is the most technically authentic of any martial arts game. Stance, footwork, guard position, and weight distribution all matter. Landing a perfect counter-throw against a charging opponent feels as satisfying as it looks — and it looks spectacular thanks to the physics-based animation system.

Career Mode follows your journey from a young student under a village Guru Besar, through regional tournaments, national championships, and finally onto the world stage. Along the way you'll encounter rival schools, inter-village conflicts, and a deeper conspiracy involving a mysterious dojo that teaches a corrupted, deadly form of Silat.

Custom Fighter Mode lets you create your own practitioner, choosing their home region (which determines their base style), physical attributes, and personality traits. Train daily, choose which techniques to focus on, and manage your fighter's stamina and injuries across a simulated season of competition.

Silat Master's online mode features ranked 1v1 matches, team tournaments for 3v3 school rivalries, and a weekly challenge mode with unique rule sets.

title: Kopi Quest
description: Run your own Indonesian coffee shop empire from a humble warung to a nationwide chain. Source beans, train baristas, and serve a cast of quirky regulars in this addictive management sim.
longDescription:
Kopi Quest is a charming coffee shop management simulation that captures the soul of Indonesian kopi culture. Start with a tiny warung and a single gas burner, and work your way up to a flagship specialty café chain serving the finest Kopi Luwak and Toraja blends to customers from Sabang to Merauke.

The sourcing system is the heart of Kopi Quest. Build relationships with coffee farmers across Indonesia's famous growing regions — Aceh Gayo, Toraja, Flores, Papua — and personally visit their farms to negotiate prices and inspect bean quality. The coffee you brew is only as good as the relationships you build with the people who grow it.

Hire and train a staff of lovable baristas, each with their own personalities, skill sets, and personal storylines. A great barista can turn a first-time visitor into a loyal regular; a bad match in your team can create chaos during morning rush hour.

The customer simulation is surprisingly deep. Regulars remember their orders, have moods that affect their tipping, and will share their experience on in-game social media, affecting your café's reputation. Master the art of Indonesian coffee service to earn five-star reviews and attract celebrity clients.

Kopi Quest also features an extensive recipe system spanning traditional Kopi Tubruk and Kopi Susu all the way to creative fusion drinks. Experiment in the recipe lab and add your signature creations to the menu.

title: Hantu Hunt
description: A co-op ghost hunting horror game featuring Indonesia's most terrifying spirits. Investigate haunted locations across the archipelago, gather evidence, and survive the night.
longDescription:
Hantu Hunt is a co-operative horror game where 1-4 players take on the role of paranormal investigators tasked with identifying and documenting supernatural entities haunting locations across Indonesia. Armed with traditional tools adapted for ghost hunting — including a Kemenyan (incense) burner for detecting spirit presence and a sacred keris for protection — you must survive long enough to complete your investigation.

The game features 15 unique Indonesian supernatural entities drawn from local folklore, each with distinct behaviors, hunting patterns, and evidence signatures. Spot the signs of a Pocong's restless bouncing, track the eerie singing of a Kuntilanak through the trees, or survive the terrifying charge of a Wewe Gombel seeking a child to kidnap. Every hantu requires a different investigation strategy.

Locations span the breadth of the archipelago: an abandoned Dutch colonial mansion in Bandung, a flooded village in Kalimantan, a remote Balinese cremation ground, a derelict fishing trawler off the Makassar coast. Each location is designed to be replayed multiple times as entity spawns and event triggers are randomized each session.

Hantu Hunt's sanity system adds psychological tension to every investigation. The longer you remain in darkness or witness supernatural events, the more your sanity deteriorates — triggering hallucinations, attracting aggressive entities, and eventually causing your character to flee uncontrollably.

Cross-platform multiplayer means PC and console players can investigate together, making Hantu Hunt perfect for late-night sessions with friends.

title: Batik Puzzle World
description: A serene and creative puzzle game where you complete and design beautiful batik patterns. Unlock hundreds of authentic motifs from across Indonesia in this relaxing mobile gem.
longDescription:
Batik Puzzle World is a beautifully crafted mobile puzzle game that celebrates the UNESCO-recognized art of Indonesian batik. The core gameplay involves completing intricate batik patterns by carefully filling in the correct colors and motifs, requiring both artistic eye and logical thinking.

The game features over 500 authentic batik patterns sourced from Indonesia's major batik-producing regions: Solo, Yogyakarta, Pekalongan, Cirebon, and Madura. Each pattern comes with cultural notes about its history, the region it comes from, and the meaning behind its motifs. Playing Batik Puzzle World is genuinely educational.

As you progress, you unlock the Batik Atelier — a free-form design mode where you can create your own batik patterns from scratch using traditional motif libraries. Share your designs with the global community or send them to a partnered printing service to have your creations printed on real fabric.

Daily challenges refresh every 24 hours and offer special rewards for completion. Seasonal events tied to Indonesian cultural celebrations introduce limited-edition motifs that can only be unlocked during the event period.

Batik Puzzle World is completely free to play with optional cosmetic purchases. No energy systems, no pay-to-win mechanics — just a pure, relaxing puzzle experience that supports Indonesian cultural heritage.

title: Singa Perdana
description: Command the legendary Majapahit war elephants and battle forces in this epic real-time strategy game set during the golden age of the greatest Hindu-Buddhist empire in Southeast Asia.
longDescription:
Singa Perdana is a real-time strategy game set during the height of the Majapahit Empire in the 14th century — the greatest Hindu-Buddhist kingdom Southeast Asia has ever seen. As a general serving under the legendary Gajah Mada, you must execute the Palapa Oath: bringing all of Nusantara under Majapahit rule.

The game features four playable civilizations — Majapahit, Sunda, Srivijaya remnants, and the trading confederation of Malaka — each with unique unit rosters, special abilities, and playstyles. Majapahit commands war elephants and disciplined infantry; Sunda relies on guerrilla tactics and jungle terrain; Srivijaya dominates the seas.

Each campaign mission is based on historical battles and diplomatic events from the era, brought to life with dramatic cutscenes and a script developed in consultation with Indonesian historians. The Palapa Campaign spans 20 missions across the archipelago, with player decisions affecting which kingdoms become allies and which resist to the end.

The RTS mechanics are deep but accessible: build your city, manage resources, recruit and upgrade units, and execute formation-based tactics in battle. A unique Mandate system tracks your reputation as a ruler, unlocking powerful late-game abilities if you govern justly or granting military bonuses if you rule through fear.

Multiplayer supports 2v2 and 3v3 matches across a library of 40+ maps, with a seasonal ranking system and a thriving community tournament scene.

title: Angkot Mayhem
description: Drive a colorfully decorated angkot through chaotic Indonesian city traffic, pick up passengers, and race rival angkot drivers in this hilariously fun arcade racer.
longDescription:
Angkot Mayhem is an arcade racing game that captures the glorious chaos of riding Indonesia's iconic shared minivans. Deck out your angkot with bumper stickers, custom paint jobs, rooftop speakers blasting dangdut music, and good-luck charms dangling from the rearview mirror, then hit the streets and try to pick up more passengers than your rivals.

The gameplay is built around a core tension: drive aggressively to beat competitors to passengers, but don't drive so recklessly that you get pulled over by a traffic cop or crash into a food cart. Momentum is everything — keep your passengers happy, avoid fines, and earn enough to upgrade your van for the next district.

Six Indonesian cities are available at launch: Bandung, Surabaya, Medan, Makassar, Denpasar, and the ultimate challenge — Jakarta. Each city has its own traffic patterns, passenger types, police aggressiveness, and iconic street layouts. Veteran Angkot Mayhem players will instantly recognize real landmarks.

The game features a raucous 4-player local multiplayer mode perfect for family game nights, and an online global leaderboard that tracks the best scores for each city route. Daily challenges offer extra coins and special cosmetics.

Angkot Mayhem's art style is deliberately maximalist and colorful, designed to celebrate the joyful visual chaos of real Indonesian street culture.

title: Rainforest Guardian
description: A stunning eco-adventure where you play as a Dayak forest guardian protecting the Kalimantan rainforest from illegal loggers and poachers. Ally with orangutans, rhinos, and forest spirits.
longDescription:
Rainforest Guardian is an action-adventure game with a powerful environmental message at its core. You play as Uli, a young Dayak woman who inherits the mantle of her tribe's forest guardian after her mentor is killed by illegal loggers threatening their ancestral rainforest in Kalimantan.

Your toolkit as a guardian is rooted in Dayak tradition: a sumpit (blowpipe) for stealth takedowns, handmade traps using forest materials, and the ability to communicate with and command the forest's animal inhabitants. Orangutans can scout from the treetops, Proboscis monkeys create diversions, and a rare white rhino serves as your mount for traversing the vast forest terrain.

The game world is a breathtakingly beautiful representation of Kalimantan's primary rainforest — a dense, layered ecosystem of towering trees, dark rivers, hidden caves, and sky-piercing canopy. Environmental detail is extraordinary: individual species of plants, insects, birds, and mammals populate the world authentically.

As you protect the forest, you gradually reconnect with the spirit world through Dayak ritual and ceremony, gaining access to supernatural abilities that let you see threats through the eyes of birds, summon protective jungle spirits, and communicate with the ancient soul of the forest itself.

Rainforest Guardian was developed in partnership with conservation organizations in Kalimantan, and a percentage of every sale is donated to Orangutan protection programs.

title: Warung Simulator
description: Run a bustling Indonesian street food warung, cook authentic recipes, serve demanding customers, and grow your humble stall into a legendary culinary destination.
longDescription:
Warung Simulator is the definitive Indonesian street food cooking game. Start with a tiny bamboo stall and a charcoal brazier, cooking just three dishes, and gradually expand your warung into a beloved neighborhood institution serving hundreds of customers a day.

The cooking mechanics are surprisingly deep and satisfying. Each dish requires precise steps: the correct amount of each spice measured in the right order, the oil heated to the right temperature, the vegetables cut with proper technique. Master these steps and your dishes will earn top ratings; rush or skip steps and customers will know immediately.

The game features over 50 authentic Indonesian recipes spanning the full diversity of the archipelago's cuisine — Rendang, Soto Ayam, Gado-Gado, Nasi Goreng, Rujak, Mie Aceh, Papeda, and many more. Each recipe comes with a cultural backstory and the opportunity to learn about the regional tradition it comes from.

Customer management is its own challenge. The Indonesian lunch rush is relentless: multiple orders at once, customers with dietary restrictions, the regular who always wants extra sambal, and the dreaded influencer who will either make or break your warung's reputation with a single post.

Warung Simulator supports cross-platform online co-op, letting a friend manage the kitchen while you work the front of house — the ideal division of labor for the busiest lunch service.

title: Galactic Batik
description: A mind-bending sci-fi shooter where Earth is protected by ancient batik patterns that serve as energy shields against alien invaders. Collect motifs, build defenses, and save the planet.
longDescription:
Galactic Batik is a wildly original sci-fi shooter that blends traditional Indonesian culture with deep space warfare. The premise: a massive alien armada has invaded Earth, and the only thing capable of deflecting their technology is the fractal energy contained within authentic Indonesian batik patterns — a discovery that makes batik artisans the most important people on the planet.

You play as Commander Dian, leader of the Batik Corps, piloting a fighter jet equipped with shields powered by different batik motifs. Parang Rusak pattern offers a powerful frontal shield; Kawung provides all-around protection; Mega Mendung creates a dampening field that slows incoming projectiles. Collecting and combining motifs is the core strategic layer.

The shooter mechanics are tight and satisfying: classic twin-stick controls with a strategic pause feature that lets you rearrange your motif loadout mid-battle. Enemies have specific energy frequencies that different motifs counter, creating a rock-paper-scissors meta that keeps the gameplay fresh across 40 missions.

Between missions, visit the Batik Lab to research new motifs, power up existing ones, and combine patterns to create hybrid shields with unique properties. The crafting system has surprising depth, rewarding players who take the time to experiment.

Galactic Batik's art style is extraordinary: space combat rendered through the visual language of traditional batik, with alien ships resembling corrupted motifs and the universe itself patterned like cosmic fabric.

title: Badminton Kings
description: The definitive badminton sports game, featuring Indonesia's national sport heroes and a career mode where you rise from local tournaments to Thomas Cup glory.
longDescription:
Badminton Kings is the most authentic and comprehensive badminton game ever made, built by Indonesian developers who grew up watching their nation dominate the sport. Play as one of 48 licensed professional players including Indonesias greatest legends and current champions, or create your own custom athlete and build them into a Thomas Cup champion.

The physics engine is the result of years of development and consultation with professional players and coaches. Smashes, drops, net shots, and defensive lifts all behave exactly as they do in real life. The deceptive flick serve, the cross-court backhand, the desperate dive to save match point — the game captures the full drama of professional badminton.

Career Mode is the heart of the game. Start as a teenager in your local PBSI club, earn your way onto the national squad, and spend years climbing the BWF World Tour rankings before facing the ultimate challenge: leading Indonesia to Thomas Cup and Uber Cup glory. Along the way, manage injuries, maintain your physical condition, and build relationships with coaches, doubles partners, and rivals.

Competitive multiplayer supports 1v1 singles and 2v2 doubles online, with regional and global ranking ladders. Regular esports tournaments with real prize pools are organized through the game's official competitive program.

Badminton Kings is the game every Indonesian sports fan has been waiting for — a world-class production that finally puts Indonesia's national sport on the map in gaming.

title: Archipelago Architect
description: A rich city-building game where you develop islands across the Indonesian archipelago, balancing modernization with environmental preservation and cultural heritage.
longDescription:
Archipelago Architect is a thoughtful city-building simulation that asks players to grapple with the real tensions of development in Indonesia: how do you build a prosperous, modern city while preserving the natural environment and cultural identity that make it worth living in?

You start with an uninhabited island and gradually build it into a thriving community. The building mechanics are rich and satisfying, with thousands of structures spanning traditional vernacular architecture — Joglo houses, Minangkabau Rumah Gadang, Torajan Tongkonan — all the way to modern commercial and industrial facilities.

The environment simulation is the game's most innovative feature. Deforestation triggers erosion and flooding. Coastal development disrupts coral reefs and fish populations. Pollution from factories affects air quality and public health. Managing these interconnected systems while still growing your city's economy is the central challenge.

Each island has an indigenous community that has lived there for generations. Respect their land rights and cultural practices to earn their cooperation and access traditional building designs; ignore them at your city's peril. The social simulation tracks community happiness, cultural vitality, and economic equality — all of which affect your city's long-term stability.

Archipelago Architect supports a map editor and Steam Workshop, with an active community creating scenarios based on real Indonesian cities and islands. The developer also releases official scenario packs tied to real urban planning challenges facing Indonesian cities.

title: Jailangkung Chronicles
description: A psychological horror adventure game where a group of teenagers accidentally summon a Jailangkung and must survive the night in a haunted old colonial house. Based on Indonesia's most famous folk horror.
longDescription:
Jailangkung Chronicles is a narrative horror adventure game that draws deeply from the rich well of Indonesian supernatural folklore. Five teenagers spend the night in an abandoned colonial house on a dare, and accidentally invoke the ritual that summons Jailangkung — a bamboo doll possessed by a wandering spirit — with devastating consequences.

The game follows all five teenagers simultaneously in a branching narrative. You switch between characters at key moments, experiencing the night from each of their perspectives. Each character has a unique personality, a secret they're hiding from the group, and a different relationship with the supernatural events unfolding around them. Who you trust, what you tell each other, and which rituals you attempt all shape who survives until morning.

The horror in Jailangkung Chronicles is psychological and atmospheric rather than reliant on jump scares. The game builds dread through environmental storytelling, unreliable narration, and a haunting sound design that makes every creak and whisper feel threatening. The Jailangkung itself is portrayed with genuine folkloric authenticity — a neutral spirit that can be helpful or deadly depending on how it's approached.

Full voice acting by an all-Indonesian cast brings the characters to life, and the writing team includes established Indonesian horror fiction authors who ensured the supernatural elements remain true to their cultural roots.

Jailangkung Chronicles has seven distinct endings depending on the choices made across the game's eight chapters.

title: Tambang Tycoon
description: Build a mining empire across Indonesia's resource-rich islands. Manage coal, nickel, and gold extraction operations while navigating government regulations and community relations.
longDescription:
Tambang Tycoon is a management simulation set in the complex world of Indonesian resource extraction. Starting with a small coal concession in Kalimantan, you must grow your mining operation into a diversified natural resource company with stakes in nickel (Sulawesi), gold (Papua), bauxite (Riau), and oil and gas (East Kalimantan).

The business simulation is detailed and realistic. Negotiate concession agreements with local governments, manage environmental impact assessments, build worker villages and facilities, navigate the export licensing bureaucracy, and weather the volatility of global commodity markets. Every decision has financial, social, and environmental consequences.

Community relations are a critical and often overlooked aspect of the mining business that Tambang Tycoon models faithfully. Conduct proper free, prior, and informed consent processes with local communities; compensate land owners fairly; build schools and clinics; and manage the social disruption that large-scale mining inevitably brings. Ignore these responsibilities and face protests, permits revoked, or worse.

The game's technology tree spans over 150 innovations in extraction technology, environmental mitigation, worker safety, and operational efficiency. Research automation carefully — it boosts profits but raises difficult questions about employment in the communities that depend on your operations.

Tambang Tycoon is explicitly designed to be morally ambiguous. There are no purely good choices in the resource extraction business, and the game presents this reality honestly rather than offering easy answers.

title: Street Food Fighter
description: A 2D brawler where Indonesian street food vendors settle their rivalries the only way they know how: with their cooking tools and secret spice weapons. Featuring 20 iconic characters.
longDescription:
Street Food Fighter is a love letter to both Indonesian street food culture and classic 2D brawlers. Twenty iconic food vendors from across the archipelago have gathered in Jakarta to settle once and for all which regional cuisine reigns supreme — and they're settling it with their fists, woks, and secret spice weapons.

The roster includes Bang Maman the Sate Seller (fighting style: skewer and flame), Ibu Wati the Rendang Master (slow but devastating, her attacks deal increasing burning damage), Pak Bakso the Meatball Man (projectile mastery, hurling meatballs at supersonic speeds), and 17 more equally creative characters each with a fully realized moveset based on their culinary specialty.

The combo system rewards creativity and timing with special cooking moves that trigger when you land the right sequence. Land Pak Bakso's signature combo and he'll dunk an opponent into a giant bowl of soup for a cinematic finishing move. Every character has three unique super attacks and a cooking-based comeback mechanic that activates when your health is critically low.

Story Mode sends each vendor on a personal quest told through hand-drawn cutscenes and Indonesian voice acting. Arcade Mode offers classic ladder progression with hidden boss encounters. Online Versus features full rollback netcode for lag-free competitive matches.

Street Food Fighter's art style mixes vibrant Indonesian street art aesthetics with comic book energy, creating one of the most visually distinctive fighting games in years.

title: Pemuda Betawi
description: A narrative RPG following three young Betawi friends navigating life, love, and loyalty in 1990s Jakarta as the city undergoes rapid transformation. A heartfelt coming-of-age story.
longDescription:
Pemuda Betawi is a narrative RPG set in the vibrant, chaotic Jakarta of the early 1990s — a city in the middle of an identity crisis, rapidly modernizing while its traditional Betawi culture clung to survival in the kampung neighborhoods being bulldozed for development.

You play as three friends — Ardi, Sari, and Doni — each from a different background but united by their kampung roots and their love for their city. The game follows them across three years of their lives as they graduate from school, find their first jobs, fall in love, and watch their neighborhood transform around them.

Dialogue choices and actions shape how the three characters' relationships evolve, who they become as adults, and what happens to their kampung. The game has no traditional combat — conflicts are resolved through conversation, wit, and occasionally Betawi silat demonstrated in dramatic cut-scenes.

The world is lovingly rendered in a warm, nostalgic art style that evokes Indonesian comic books of the era. Jakarta landmarks from the 1990s are recreated with attention to detail that will delight anyone old enough to remember them: the original Sarinah department store, the old Senen market, Blok M bus terminal in its heyday.

Pemuda Betawi's soundtrack is a curated collection of original music in the Gambang Kromong, Ondel-ondel, and pop Betawi styles performed by contemporary Indonesian musicians honoring the tradition.

title: Papua Quest
description: Explore the uncharted highlands of Papua in this breathtaking adventure game, forging bonds with highland tribes and uncovering an ancient mystery hidden in the Baliem Valley.
longDescription:
Papua Quest is an exploration and adventure game set in the stunning and largely unexplored highlands of Papua, Indonesia. You play as Lukas, an ethnobotanist who accompanies an expedition into the Baliem Valley and discovers evidence of a civilization far older than anything in the historical record.

The highlands of Papua are rendered with extraordinary fidelity — moss-covered limestone karst formations, rushing highland rivers, impenetrable cloud forest, and the dramatic Baliem Valley filled with traditional Dani villages surrounded by ancient agricultural terraces. The world invites exploration at every turn.

Central to Papua Quest is the cultural exchange system. As Lukas, you must earn the trust of the highland communities encountered during the expedition, learning fragments of their language, participating in ceremonies, understanding their worldview, and ultimately working with them rather than around them to solve the game's central mystery.

The game features an innovative knowledge system: the more Lukas learns about the local environment and culture, the more options open up in both exploration and dialogue. A botanist who has learned to identify local plants can find food sources and medicinal herbs; one who has built trust with a community can access sacred sites closed to outsiders.

Papua Quest was developed with the involvement of Papuan cultural organizations and includes a comprehensive behind-the-scenes documentary mode that shares the real history, traditions, and contemporary life of the people whose culture inspired the game.

title: Volcano Run
description: An adrenaline-pumping endless runner set on the slopes of an erupting Indonesian volcano. Dodge lava flows, leap over pyroclastic clouds, and race your friends in this free-to-play mobile hit.
longDescription:
Volcano Run is a free-to-play endless runner that puts you on the slopes of an erupting Indonesian volcano — Merapi, Bromo, Krakatau, and more are all represented in the game. Run, slide, jump, and dodge your way down the volcanic slope while lava bombs rain from above, ash clouds reduce visibility, and the ground itself splits open beneath your feet.

The game features five unique volcanoes as stages, each with distinct visual themes, hazard types, and environmental gimmicks. Merapi's slopes are forested and the hazards come suddenly through the trees; Bromo's caldera is a vast, open ash plain where hazards are visible from far away but come in overwhelming numbers; Krakatau runs across a floating island with ocean gaps to leap.

Character customization is extensive and all cosmetic. Dress your runner in traditional Indonesian folk costumes, give them unique running animations, equip power-up items modeled on Indonesian cultural artifacts. The gacha system for cosmetics is deliberately generous, ensuring players don't feel pressured to spend.

Multiplayer race mode lets 8 players compete on the same volcanic slope simultaneously in real time, creating hilarious chaos as players jostle for position while lava bombs explode around them. Weekly community events track total distance run across all players and unlock global rewards when milestones are hit.

Volcano Run is free to play with no energy systems and no pay-to-win elements — just cosmetics and quality-of-life features available for purchase.

title: Dapur Nusantara
description: A comprehensive Indonesian cooking school simulator featuring 200+ recipes, master chef mentors, and a culinary competition mode. Learn to cook real Indonesian food while playing.
longDescription:
Dapur Nusantara is equal parts cooking game and genuine culinary education tool. The game's 200+ recipes were developed in collaboration with Indonesian professional chefs and are accurate enough that players who follow the in-game instructions will be able to recreate the dishes in their real kitchens.

The cooking simulation is the most detailed in any game. Specific knife techniques affect texture and cooking time; spice ratios determine flavor profiles; heat management is the difference between perfectly caramelized onions and a burnt mess. Tutorial levels with master chef avatars guide you through foundational techniques before setting you loose in increasingly complex recipes.

The story mode follows Nadia, a young chef who returns to her grandmother's restaurant in Padang after studying culinary arts in Jakarta, and must relearn the traditional cooking she grew up with — which turns out to be far more complex than anything she studied in school. The story explores the tension between traditional and modern cooking and the importance of preserving culinary heritage.

Competition Mode pits you against other chefs in challenges judged on taste (accuracy to recipe), presentation (plating mini-games), and speed. Online competitions are held weekly with real-world prizes including cooking equipment and restaurant vouchers.

Dapur Nusantara also features a recipe export system that generates printable recipe cards from in-game recipes, bridging the digital and real-world cooking experience.

title: Keris: Blade of Destiny
description: A dark action RPG where the sacred Keris you carry is not just a weapon but a living spirit bound to your fate. Master its powers and unravel an ancient curse threatening the world.
longDescription:
Keris: Blade of Destiny is a soulslike action RPG built around the mystical properties of the Keris — Indonesia's sacred ceremonial dagger, recognized by UNESCO as a cultural masterpiece. Your keris is not a passive weapon: it is Naga, a spirit bound to the blade since its forging centuries ago, and it speaks to you, guides you, and occasionally disagrees with your choices.

The combat system is deeply satisfying and skill-dependent. The keris's wavy blade enables unique attack patterns that weave between enemy guards; its supernatural properties allow for parries that absorb enemy energy and convert it into powerful counter-attacks. Different keris pamor (blade patterns) have different elemental affinities — fire, water, earth, lightning — that can be switched on the fly to exploit enemy weaknesses.

The world draws on Javanese cosmology, presenting a realm where the physical and supernatural overlap. Spirit realms layer over the physical world, and as your bond with Naga deepens, you gain the ability to shift between them to find hidden paths, reveal invisible enemies, and access ancient knowledge.

The central narrative is a philosophical journey about duty, fate, and the relationship between a weapon and the hand that wields it. Naga has centuries of experience and opinion, and dialogues with the spirit shape how the story unfolds and which ending you reach.

Keris: Blade of Destiny features New Game+ with additional content and a True Ending that requires mastering all of the keris's abilities.

title: Dangdut Fever
description: The ultimate Dangdut rhythm game featuring 100+ classic and contemporary Dangdut hits. Tap, swipe, and groove your way to stardom in Indonesia's beloved musical genre.
longDescription:
Dangdut Fever is the rhythm game Indonesian music fans have been dreaming of. Featuring over 100 licensed Dangdut songs spanning the genre's full history — from Rhoma Irama's classics to contemporary Koplo hits — this is the definitive celebration of Indonesia's most beloved musical genre.

The gameplay is built on a satisfying tap-and-swipe rhythm engine designed specifically for touchscreen but fully playable with a controller. Notes fall in patterns that feel physically like Dangdut dancing — hip-shaking rhythms, dramatic tabla accents, soaring melodic lines. The feedback when you nail a perfect streak is intensely satisfying.

Career Mode follows aspiring Dangdut singer Ratih from village performances to national television shows and eventually a headlining concert at a packed Gelora Bung Karno stadium. The story is funny, heartfelt, and full of affectionate satire of the Indonesian entertainment industry.

Social features are central to Dangdut Fever. Challenge friends to specific songs, share your performance replays, and compete on weekly leaderboards for each track. A karaoke mode displays lyrics so you can sing along (and optionally records your performance with the microphone).

Regular updates add new songs, including originals written for the game by legendary Indonesian Dangdut composers. A Creator Mode lets players create custom note charts for songs not in the base library.

title: Mentawai Surf Legend
description: Shred the legendary waves of the Mentawai Islands in the most realistic surfing simulator ever made. Travel Indonesia's world-class surf spots from Uluwatu to G-Land.
longDescription:
Mentawai Surf Legend is a surfing simulation game that brings the world-class waves of the Indonesian archipelago to life with stunning fidelity. Built on a proprietary wave physics engine, the game recreates the specific characteristics of each surf break — the way the swell wraps around Nias Point, the hollow barrel of HTs in the Mentawais, the massive right-hander of G-Land — with accuracy that has drawn praise from professional surfers who helped test the game.

The surfing mechanics reward authentic technique. Reading the lineup, paddling into the right position, timing your pop-up, using body weight to control speed and direction, performing cutbacks and top-turns in the pocket — every element of real surfing has been translated into intuitive controls with enormous skill ceiling for dedicated players.

Career Mode follows a young surfer from a Balinese fishing family who discovers a talent for riding waves and pursues their dream of competing on the world stage. The story weaves through Indonesian surf culture, the tension between tourism and local community at famous breaks, and the spiritual relationship Balinese culture has with the ocean.

The game features 15 surf spots across Indonesia at launch, each rendered in a specific season and swell direction based on real-world data. Day/night cycles and weather systems affect wave quality, crowd levels, and visibility. Experienced players will know which spots to target based on swell forecasts shown on the in-game weather map.

Multiplayer lets up to 8 surfers share a lineup and compete for waves in real time, including heat-format competitions with live judging.

title: Ojek Online Simulator
description: Experience the daily hustle of an Indonesian online motorcycle taxi driver. Navigate city traffic, manage finances, and build a reputation in this realistic and heartfelt life simulation.
longDescription:
Ojek Online Simulator is a life simulation game that puts you in the shoes of a gig economy motorcycle taxi driver in a busy Indonesian city. Inspired by the real experiences of millions of Indonesian workers who drive for platforms like Gojek and Grab, the game explores the humanity behind the helmet with warmth, humor, and genuine empathy.

Your character — customizable in gender, background, and motivation — drives for economic necessity: supporting a family, saving for school fees, paying off a debt. The financial simulation is detailed and respectful: manage fuel costs, bike maintenance, insurance, commission rates, and the difference between surge pricing and slow periods. Making ends meet requires smart decisions and hard work.

The passenger system is where the game's heart lies. Hundreds of unique passengers have their own personalities, stories, and occasionally recurring appearances as you become a familiar face in their daily lives. The elderly woman going to the hospital. The student cramming for exams. The young couple on a date. The late-night factory worker. Their stories gradually build into a tapestry of urban Indonesian life.

Beyond rides, you can take food delivery orders, run errands, and eventually save enough to lease a car and expand into the passenger sedan market. Driver reputation affects order priority, tip rates, and which corporate contract orders become available.

Ojek Online Simulator was designed in close consultation with real ojol drivers, and is committed to representing their experiences honestly — including the challenges of the gig economy.

title: Krakatau: The Awakening
description: A disaster management game where you must coordinate the evacuation of a coastal Indonesian city before a massive volcanic eruption and tsunami strike. Every decision saves or costs lives.
longDescription:
Krakatau: The Awakening is a tense strategy-simulation game based on the real science of volcanic disaster management. Anak Krakatau is showing signs of an imminent catastrophic eruption, and as the newly appointed Regional Disaster Coordinator, you have precious little time to evacuate hundreds of thousands of coastal residents before the mountain and the sea deliver their verdict.

The game is built on exhaustive research into volcanic disaster management, emergency systems, and the specific geography of the Sunda Strait region. Consult with volcanologists to determine eruption timing, coordinate with local government officials to issue evacuation orders, manage shelter capacity and supply logistics, and deal with a public that ranges from cooperative to dangerously skeptical.

Every decision has a human cost. Issue evacuations too early and you deplete resources and erode public trust for the next warning. Issue them too late and people die. The game models individual family units across the affected zone, and a post-scenario report tells you exactly which households made it out and which did not — making the consequences of your decisions viscerally real.

Krakatau: The Awakening features six scenarios of increasing complexity: a small island evacuation, a major coastal city, a cross-strait coordination exercise, a night eruption with communication failures, a scenario with multiple simultaneous hazards, and a historical recreation of the 1883 Krakatau eruption that allows players to apply modern disaster management methods.

The game is used as a training tool by several Indonesian regional disaster management agencies (BPBD).

title: Subak: Water Temple
description: Manage the ancient Balinese Subak water irrigation system, balancing the spiritual, agricultural, and ecological needs of a terraced rice community. A uniquely meditative strategy experience.
longDescription:
Subak: Water Temple is a strategy game inspired by the UNESCO World Heritage-listed Balinese irrigation system — one of the most sophisticated agricultural management systems ever devised, which has sustained Balinese rice cultivation for over a thousand years without formal written rules.

You play as the Pekaseh, the keeper of your Subak's relationship with the water temple network. Your responsibilities span the practical (ensuring every rice terrace in your network receives adequate irrigation at the right time, managing flood risk during the monsoon, maintaining the channels and sluices) and the spiritual (organizing the temple ceremonies that coordinate planting and harvest schedules across the entire system).

The core mechanic is a puzzle-like water distribution system. Rainfall fills highland reservoirs; you must route water through an intricate network of channels to reach each paddy field at precisely the right growth stage. Too much water at the wrong time can destroy a crop; too little during the critical periods causes failure. The system must be balanced simultaneously for dozens of farmers with different plot sizes and crop timings.

The social simulation models the Subak community as a collective of farmers with individual needs, personalities, and political alignments. Mediate disputes over water allocation, resolve conflicts between upstream and downstream farmers, and earn the trust of the community to access the collective labor (ngayah) needed for major infrastructure repairs.

Subak: Water Temple won the Game Developers Conference award for Best Simulation Design in 2024.

title: Rumah Hantu: The Inheritance
description: A first-person horror exploration game set in a sprawling haunted Dutch colonial mansion. Uncover your family's dark history while surviving increasingly terrifying supernatural encounters.
longDescription:
Rumah Hantu: The Inheritance is a first-person psychological horror game set in a vast, decaying Dutch colonial mansion in rural West Java. You are Mira, a young architect who has inherited the property from an aunt she barely knew, and arrive to assess the house for sale — only to find yourself trapped as night falls and the house reveals its terrible secrets.

The mansion itself is the star of Rumah Hantu. Designed with architectural accuracy to Dutch Indische colonial homes of the early 20th century, the house unfolds like a nightmarish puzzle box — wings that shouldn't exist appearing behind locked doors, rooms that shift between the present day and disturbing visions of the past, and a basement whose contents the family clearly went to great lengths to conceal.

The horror is rooted in Indonesian supernatural belief rather than Western horror conventions. The entities in Rumah Hantu are tied to specific places, objects, and rituals; understanding the folkloric logic behind each haunting is often the key to surviving it. The game rewards players who pay attention to cultural details and resist the urge to dismiss what they experience as irrational.

Rumah Hantu features a document collection system where Mira gradually pieces together her family's history through letters, photographs, newspaper clippings, and official documents spanning 80 years. The mystery is genuinely surprising and the revelation of the family secret is one of the most affecting moments in recent gaming.

The game has no combat. Survival depends entirely on understanding, avoidance, and occasionally ritual. It is not a game for the faint-hearted.

title: Lombok Longboard
description: A chill and stylish longboarding game set on the scenic roads and beach paths of Lombok. Cruise, perform tricks, and explore a beautifully rendered Indonesian island paradise.
longDescription:
Lombok Longboard is a relaxed, stylish action sports game set on the gorgeous island of Lombok — Bali's laid-back neighbor, often called 'the real Bali' by those who know it. Ride through winding roads lined with palm trees, skate the smooth concrete paths of Senggigi beach, carve down the slopes near Mount Rinjani, and discover secret skate spots hidden across the island.

The longboarding mechanics prioritize feel and flow over technical complexity. Carving through a long downhill section with perfect timing, executing a smooth cross-step to the nose of the board, catching air off a natural ramp and landing a casual kickflip — the game rewards style and smoothness rather than button-mashing combos.

The world of Lombok is rendered in a warm, painterly art style that captures the island's golden hour atmosphere perfectly. The game operates on a day-night cycle and changes subtly with the hour — morning fog lifting off the rice fields, the blue shadow of afternoon in the fishing villages, the magical golden light of Lombok's legendary sunsets.

A photo mode with extensive options lets you capture beautiful screenshots of your skating adventures. The community gallery features the best player-submitted shots from around the world, and top shots are featured in the game's loading screens.

Lombok Longboard is explicitly designed as a calm, joyful experience. There are no fail states, no time limits, no competitive pressure. Just you, your board, and one of Indonesia's most beautiful islands.

title: Anak Betawi
description: A fun and educational mobile game for children that teaches Indonesian language, culture, and history through adventures with a plucky Betawi kid named Jono and his magical kite.
longDescription:
Anak Betawi is an educational adventure game designed for Indonesian children aged 6-12. Follow Jono, a cheerful and mischievous kid from a Betawi family in Jakarta, and his magical kite Wau that can fly him to different historical periods and regions across Indonesia to learn about the country's incredible cultural diversity.

Each episode takes Jono to a different Indonesian region or historical era, where he encounters local customs, foods, traditional games, music, and challenges. Episodes visit the Sultanate of Yogyakarta, the Minangkabau heartland of West Sumatra, the Toraja highlands of Sulawesi, the Dayak villages of Kalimantan, and the Asmat people of Papua, among many others.

Learning objectives are woven seamlessly into gameplay. Language lessons are disguised as puzzles; history is taught through interactive scenes rather than lectures; cultural values like gotong royong, respect for elders, and care for the environment are embodied in Jono's adventures rather than stated explicitly. Curriculum alignment has been verified by Indonesian education experts.

Parents and teachers can access a companion dashboard showing learning progress, completed objectives, and curriculum alignment. The game generates weekly reports that can be shared with schools.

Anak Betawi is certified by the Indonesian Ministry of Education and used in over 2,000 schools across the country as a supplementary learning tool. All content is fully appropriate for children with no violence, scary content, or inappropriate themes.

title: Tanam Nusantara
description: A peaceful mobile game about collecting and growing Indonesia's rare and endangered plant species. Connect with a community of virtual botanists and help protect biodiversity.
longDescription:
Tanam Nusantara is a serene collection and cultivation game built around Indonesia's extraordinary plant biodiversity — the country contains over 30,000 plant species, including many found nowhere else on Earth, and hundreds are currently threatened with extinction.

Players build and expand a virtual botanical garden, collecting rare species found during exploration events, acquiring seeds through trading with other players, and carefully tending to each plant's specific needs. Different species require different soil types, watering schedules, humidity levels, and companion plants — the horticultural simulation is detailed enough to be genuinely educational.

Every plant in the game is based on a real Indonesian species. Each one comes with a detailed fact sheet about its real-world characteristics, ecological role, cultural uses (many are traditional medicines, foods, or sacred plants), and conservation status. Unlocking a new plant teaches you something real about Indonesia's natural heritage.

The community features are central to Tanam Nusantara. Trade seeds with friends, visit other players' gardens for inspiration, participate in collaborative conservation challenges where the whole community works together to 'save' a critically endangered species by unlocking research funding donated by the developer to real conservation organizations.

Tanam Nusantara is free to play with optional premium features. The developer has committed to donating 5% of all revenue to Indonesian plant conservation programs.

title: Bandung Cyberpunk 2077
description: A cyberpunk action RPG set in a dystopian future Bandung where Dutch colonial architecture and neon-soaked high-tech megacorporations collide. Be the rebel who changes the city's fate.
longDescription:
Bandung Cyberpunk 2077 imagines a Bandung of the far future where the city's famous heritage colonial architecture has been preserved and incorporated into a vertical megacity of towering arcologies, neon signs in both Sundanese script and corporate logos, and underground networks buzzing with black-market tech and resistance movements.

You play as Dian, a street-level hacker and mercenary with a neural implant that grants access to the city's corporate network. Your skills combine physical combat — fluid parkour across rooftops, brutal melee enhanced by cybernetic augmentations — with hacking that lets you disable security systems, reroute power grids, and even briefly control enemy combatants.

Bandung is divided into six districts controlled by different corporations, each with its own aesthetic, security level, and underground culture. The traditional Sundanese arts district has been co-opted by a culture corporation that monetizes heritage for profit; the factory district is run by drones and guarded by autonomous robots; the elite sky district floats above the pollution line behind invisible shields.

The story is a sharp political allegory about colonialism, corporate power, and cultural identity — themes that resonate deeply with Indonesian history. The game pulls no punches in its critique of exploitative economic systems, but presents its world with too much love and detail to feel preachy.

Full Sundanese and Indonesian voice acting, an original electronic-gamelan fusion soundtrack, and a visual style that fuses batik patterns with holographic interfaces make Bandung Cyberpunk 2077 one of the most distinctive-looking games ever made.

title: Nongkrong Simulator
description: The most Indonesian game ever made: sit at a warung with friends, drink kopi, and have rambling conversations that somehow change the world. A social sim unlike anything else.
longDescription:
Nongkrong Simulator is a social simulation game built around the quintessential Indonesian activity of nongkrong — the art of hanging out with friends at a warung, drinking kopi, and talking about absolutely everything for hours. It is, deliberately and joyfully, a game about doing very little and finding it deeply satisfying.

You play as yourself — a customizable character who has just moved to a new city and must build a social circle, a sense of community, and eventually a network of relationships that gives you the power to make a real difference in your neighborhood. All of this happens through conversation, shared meals, and the slow accumulation of trust.

The dialogue system is the most sophisticated in any social game. Conversations branch and loop in naturalistic ways — a topic that seemed resolved resurfaces 20 minutes later with new context; an offhand remark sparks a philosophical debate about life's meaning; someone tells a story that unlocks a side quest you didn't know existed. The characters feel genuinely alive.

As your network grows, your group's collective energy becomes a force for change. Organize a neighborhood cleanup; start a community library; campaign for a better bus route; stand up to a developer threatening a beloved old warung. Big changes come from small conversations.

Nongkrong Simulator was made by a tiny Indonesian indie team and became a viral sensation, resonating deeply with players who recognized something true about Indonesian social life in every moment of the game. It is funny, poignant, and occasionally profound.
